LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PEREMPTORY WRIT - THE WRIT OF MANDATE IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT DID NOT COMPLY WITH THE DUE PROCESS REQUIREMENT SET FORTH IN THE CITY OF INGLEWOOD- LA COUNTY VS. SUPERIOR COURT. PETITIONER WAS NOT REASONABLY NOTIFIED OF ANY EVIDENCE RELECTING ON ITS RESPONSIBILITY PRIOR TO THE HEARING. THE FINDINGS OF NON-RESPONSIBILITY AS TO PETITIONER ARE SET ASIDE. THE CONTRACT AWARDED TO GONSALVES & STRONCK CO. IS SET ASIDE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185. (302/EHG)
